name: property managers handling 5–15 properties/month tool
description: For property managers handling 5–15 properties/month, the complexity of compliance requirements causes missed deadlines. We automate compliance audit report preparation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in generating timely compliance audit reports.
features: user-friendly dashboard for tracking compliance status
